name: slurm
title: Slurm
description: Manage Slurm jobs across multiple clusters and inspect utilization from Raycast
author: p-koenig

commands.name: manage-jobs
commands.title: My Slurm Jobs
commands.subtitle: Slurm
commands.description: List your Slurm jobs for all active clusters.

commands.name: resources
commands.title: HPC Info
commands.subtitle: Slurm
commands.description: Hardware information for all active clusters.

commands.name: node-utilization
commands.title: HPC Util
commands.subtitle: Slurm
commands.description: Live per-node CPU load, memory utilization and GPU availability.

commands.name: all-jobs
commands.title: All Slurm Jobs
commands.subtitle: Slurm
commands.description: List all Slurm jobs for all active clusters.

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Slurm Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Slurm
commands.description: Show running and pending job counts in the macOS menu bar for all active clusters.

commands.name: select-cluster
commands.title: Select Clusters
commands.subtitle: Slurm
commands.description: Select the active SSH hosts and authenticate.
